productDisplayName: Genesis Men Solid Navy Blue Trousers
description: CompositionNavy blue trousers made of a poly-rayon blend fabric, has a flat front, two pockets on the sides, two pockets on the back with button closures, looped waist, and a button and zipper closureFittingSlim Fit; Straight legWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned to be worn as formal wear with a matching shirt, jacket and accessories, these straight leg trousers from genesis are made of soft poly-rayon fabric to offer a flawless formal silhouette.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 40 cmHeight: 6.2', Waist: 32”
